description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a series of large, faceted beads in alternating shades of purple and pink, strung along a black beaded chain. The beads are arranged symmetrically, with the largest beads at the center and smaller ones toward the ends. The necklace is secured at the back with a metallic chain and clasp, which allows for adjustable length. The black beads forming the chain are small and round, providing a striking contrast to the colorful, glossy central beads. The overall design is bold and geometric, with a modern, urban flair. The necklace is displayed on a neutral, matte-finished bust, highlighting its vibrant colors and polished surfaces.
description: A bold, geometric beaded necklace with alternating purple and pink faceted beads on a black beaded chain, finished with a metallic clasp.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of large purple and pink beads and the black beaded chain.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the necklace and the curvature of the beaded chain.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the metallic chain and clasp, showing the adjustable fastening mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the side profile and bead arrangement.
